overall.description: A third-person gameplay sequence from a cinematic video game showing a character carrying heavy cargo traversing a misty mountain valley. The character runs along a rocky path surrounded by steep grey cliffs and sparse vegetation under an overcast sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: mountain valley path with towering rock spire ahead

agents.ego_description: running steadily along the valley path toward a distinctive tall rock spire formation

entered.detail: tall thin rock spire rising prominently in the center of the valley ahead
steep grey rocky mountains forming the left valley wall
steep grey rocky mountains forming the right valley wall
rocky dirt trail winding through the valley floor
small yellow flowering plants scattered along the path edges

segments.scene_description: The character runs along a rocky valley path toward a prominent tall spire rock formation visible in the distance. The surrounding landscape features steep grey mountain walls on both sides under an overcast sky, with sparse vegetation and small yellow plants dotting the terrain.

scene_state.functional_zone: open mountain valley with rocky terrain

events.description: character turns slightly left as the path curves, passing the tall spire rock formation

agents.ego_description: continuing to run through the open valley as the terrain opens up after passing the spire

segments.scene_description: The character continues running through the widening valley after passing the tall spire, which falls behind and to the left. The mountain ranges on both sides appear closer as the character moves deeper into the valley along the rocky path.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky valley floor with large boulder obstacles

events.description: character steers right to navigate around a large boulder blocking the path

agents.ego_description: approaching and circling around a large boulder obstructing the path while maintaining pace

entered.detail: large grey boulder sitting in the middle of the valley path ahead

segments.scene_description: The character approaches a large boulder blocking the valley path, then maneuvers around it to the right. The surrounding mountain terrain remains consistent with rocky cliffs and sparse grass as the character continues through the valley.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a narrow mountain pass that gradually widens as the character pushes deeper into a rocky valley. It begins with the character running along a rugged path toward a prominent tall spire rock formation, flanked by steep grey walls and sparse yellow plants under an overcast sky. As the character passes the spire, the landmark falls behind to the left and the valley opens up, though the surrounding mountain ranges seem to press closer. The scene then shifts as the character approaches a large boulder blocking the path, maneuvering around it to the right. Finally, the camera continues to track the character's progress through the consistent terrain of rocky cliffs and sparse grass.
